emails.subject: EEX Quote
emails.body: EEX Quote Attached are the volumes..... I had a mid, volume adjusted number of $2.869, with an adjustment of .069 The quote is not a long as I was thinking. Let me know, Eric

emails.subject: RE: EEX Quote
emails.body: RE: EEX Quote I came up with a 0.06 cent adjustment live quote of 2.885 all in price To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: EEX Quote
emails.body: RE: EEX Quote settle came out at 2.878 To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: EEX Quote
emails.body: That is your offer at tonights settle? To: Boyt, Eric

emails.subject: RE: EEX Quote
emails.body: no that is the settle the market is not trading there but just so you know what the settle is for tonight To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: EEX Quote
emails.body: RE: EEX Quote I have the mid on deal as 2.915 Curve adjust -0.065 my offer is 2.87 let me know if you need anything else To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: EEX Quote
emails.body: Thanks and thanks for letting my dad ask a few questions. E To: Boyt, Eric

emails.subject: RE: EEX Quote
emails.body: no prob dq To: Quigley, Dutch
